name: revit_tag_rebar
description: Creates a category tag on the first subelement of a selected rebar at its centerline start.

view_id.description: View id where the tag is created

tag_type_id.description: Optional FamilySymbol id for the tag type

has_leader.description: Whether the tag has a leader (sample uses true)

notes: Uses Rebar.GetSubelements and IndependentTag.Create with subelement Reference.
